# Tripod X Display 24x70 Replacement Banner

Do you need to update the content on your Tripod X Display 24x70? Get started on your replacement for your Tripod X Display below. You can customize it for any occasion or location. We have lots of templates available for you use. You can edit the banner template in our online designer by adding clip art, photos, text, and a background.

*   [Create your Product](#cust)
*   [Order Process](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6)
*   [Shipping](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7)

_Click on a template to customize your product_

### Three Ways to Order Replacement Material

There are three ways you can order replacements online. 

1.  Pick a Template to Customize
    *   Add a background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics
2.  Upload a File
    *   [Click here to visit our artwork specifications page](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs)
3.  Let us Design
    *   We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl replacement for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us

### Replacement Production Times

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it’s important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from 1 to 5 business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

\*\*\* Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\*

*   3 Day Standard: This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders.
*   1 Day Priority: Combine Priority production with UPS overnight shipping for blazing fast delivery.
*   2 Day Express: Have an extra day but still need it quickly? Express is for you.
*   5 Day Saver: If you aren’t in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option.

The time it will take to receive your product is production time plus shipping time.

_Please contact one of our professional customer service representatives at (320) 391-5300 if you have any additional questions._ 

### Payment Information

All vinyl banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your options.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order.

Please note we have a minimum order of $35.00 in product.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Shipping Information

Please specify which shipping method you would like when you place your order. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. [Visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our standard and oversized vinyl banner shipping times. If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service prior to ordering. Phone: 320-391-5300

We offer the following shipping methods:

*   Economy (5-10 Business Days)
*   Standard (3-5 Business Days)
*   Three Day (3 Business Days)
*   Two Day (2 Business Days)
*   Overnight (1 Business Day)

Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. Please note, due to UPS shipping restrictions, banners that exceed 8' in both directions will generally be folded for shipping (billboards, large backdrops etc.)

If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

After products have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if any shipping company has a delay in your package. We recommend ordering your banners early.

Delays because of Acts of God or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

Please order your banners early as we cannot control delivery after your product leaves our production facilities.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## More About Tripod X Displays

### Material Options

#### Standard 13oz Vinyl

Our high-quality 13oz vinyl banner material is the standard material we use for banner stands. IT is rated for both indoor and outdoor use.

#### Premium Stay-Flat 14oz Vinyl

Our 14oz vinyl banner material is a recommended upgrade if you are looking for a professional, yet affordable look. This product produces high-quality prints and has as mooth matte finish.

#### Banner Soft Fabric

Our Banner Soft Fabric offers a matte-finish with vibrant print colors. The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot-knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
